headline: Is TELUS (TSX:T) Still Attractive After Recent Share Price Weakness And Mixed Valuation Signals
summary: If you are wondering whether TELUS at around $16.41 still offers value, or if the recent share price puts too much on the line, this article walks through the key numbers to help you frame that question clearly. The stock has been under pressure, with returns of 8.4% over the past week, 9.0% over the last month, and 11.8% over the past year, adding to a 3 year return of 28.2% and a 5 year return of 14.6%. These moves have come as TELUS continues to feature in ongoing discussions about...
